findings: QUIET TICK #6 (CONSECUTIVE) AT SESSION CLOSE: zero trades in the 15:00 → 15:30 window. Strategy has been silent for ~197 minutes (3h17m) since the COALINDIA BUY at 12:13:31. State is BIT-IDENTICAL to the 12:30, 13:00, 13:30, 14:00, 14:30 AND 15:00 snapshots: holdings, cash, OPEN orders, sector exposures, and realized P&L all unchanged across six consecutive ticks. NSE close at 15:30 IST means no further intra-session admissions are possible — this snapshot is the closing intra-session state.

TRIGGER (h) NOW FULLY FIRES (2-of-2 LEGS): leg-1 (≥1 OPEN >28h-stale) — TATAPOWER at 29h17m (just crossed 29h this tick), HINDZINC at 28h47m. leg-2 (silence > 180 min) crossed cleanly at ~15:13:31 (180-min mark). Per spec, Trigger (h) is a SOFT OBSERVABILITY LOG, NOT a numeric lever — it does not motivate an override change, especially at session close when no admissions can be made. Order-hygiene drag now affects 2 of 3 carryover OPEN orders for the second consecutive day; this is a clear strategy-agent EOD audit candidate (whether to cancel/re-submit the >28h carryover orders).

Realized P&L today: -₹5,964.24 (-0.60% of capital). Buffer to 3% daily loss gate ₹23,903.54 (4.0x); buffer to -1% findings threshold ₹3,991.69 (1.67x). Unchanged from 12:30 / 13:00 / 13:30 / 14:00 / 14:30 / 15:00 (6th consecutive bit-identical reading). Trigger (d) for daily_loss_limit_pct tightening (loss past -1%) DORMANT — no MTM mechanism to fire it given persistent strategy silence and now session close.

Deployment at cost: 44.84% — 20.16 pp inside the 0.65 max_deployed_pct cap. Projected on full carryover fill: 57.91% — 7.09 pp inside cap. Admission window comfortably open (though session is now closed, so admissions can only occur at next session open).

Sector concentration broad: FMCG 12.06%, Power 9.91%, BFSI 7.91%, Pharma 5.22%, Gold-ETF 5.03%, Mining/Coal 4.71%. Six distinct sectors. Largest single sector (FMCG) sits 9.94 pp inside cap. Day-3/Day-4 BFSI cluster has fully decongested via MAHABANK (today) + INDUSINDBK (Day-4) + AUBANK (Day-4) exits — only PNBHOUSING (7.91%) remains.

PSU/utility-energy thematic exposure at cost remains at 14.62% (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA). On full TATAPOWER fill: 19.52% with 2.48 pp buffer to the 22% sector cap. No new admissions in this thematic since 12:13:31 — Trigger (a) NOT FIRED.

Position sizing: NESTLEIND remains largest at 12.06% (2.94 pp buffer to 0.15 cap). Other 6 names range 4.71% to 7.91%. No single name approaches the per-name cap. Concentration risk on a per-name basis is mild and well-distributed.

All 7 risk overrides remain materially tighter than base config and binding-but-not-breached. Session-close portfolio profile holds cleanly: deployment well inside cap, broad sector diversification across 6 sectors, no single-name dominance, modest realized loss inside buffer, and strategy demonstrated SELL-before-BUY discipline earlier in the session (3 SELLs at 11:16-11:44 → 1 BUY at 12:13 — net cash freed ~₹37,621).

DISCIPLINED CALL: NO OVERRIDE CHANGE. Trigger (j) from the 14:30 and 15:00 assessments fires for the THIRD consecutive tick and explicitly directs DEFERRAL of all override re-evaluation to the 16:00 EOD review. None of the carry-forward spec-hard triggers (a)-(g) have fired in the 15:00 → 15:30 window. Trigger (h) now fully fires 2-of-2 but per spec is observability-only and does not motivate a numeric lever — particularly redundant at session close when no admissions can occur. Tightening overrides on a 6th consecutive quiet tick at session close, with bit-identical state and 30 minutes until the EOD strategy-agent review window opens, would be theatrical and would punish exactly the disciplined-pause behavior the framework rewards.

Risk level LOW (unchanged from 15:00, 14:30, 14:00, 13:30, 13:00, 12:30). Composite distress meta-trigger DORMANT on all 3 legs: realized P&L well inside 3% gate (4.0x buffer), no single-name distress visible at the cost-basis snapshot level, strategy silence (197 min) is now post-session-close so the 'extended silence' regime doesn't apply (no further admissions are possible until next session). The Day-2 'extended silence' regime that motivated earlier escalations was 24h+ during active session hours; the current 197 min spans the inactive late-session window.

EOD HANDOFF TO 16:00 STRATEGY-AGENT REVIEW: per Trigger (j) deferral, all carry-forward override-relaxation candidates remain DEFERRED to 16:00 for strategy-agent disposition. Open audit questions for 16:00: (1) max_deployed_pct 0.65 — relax toward 0.70 given today's demonstrated SELL-before-BUY discipline + 6-tick monitoring posture? (2) min_confidence 0.65 — relax toward 0.62 given closed-trade rotation sample? (3) max_sector_pct 0.22 — keep tight given that BFSI has fully decongested and 6 sectors are actively held?
